_purpose: Sinister Term keybindings - operator overrides. Edit to rebind without recompile.
_action_vocabulary: submit:<text>       - replace prompt buffer with <text> and submit (runs the slash command)
_key_syntax: prompt_toolkit format: c-l = Ctrl+L, c-x c-c = Ctrl+X then Ctrl+C, escape = Esc, etc.
_set_to_null_to_unbind: {"c-l": null} removes the default Ctrl+L binding.
